sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: INVESTOR NOTICE: ODDITY Tech. (ODD) Investors with
feed.summary: Hagens Berman has filed a securities class action lawsuit against ODDITY Tech. Ltd. (NASDAQ: ODD) for investors who purchased securities between February 26, 2025, and February 24, 2026. This action follows a 49% decline in ODDITY's stock price, triggered by an expected 30% year-over-year Q1 2026 revenue decline due to undisclosed algorithm changes by a major advertising partner. The firm urges investors with substantial losses to come forward to lead the investor class action.

feed.title: Pre-planned sale: Ollie's (NASDAQ: OLLI) chair sells 3,330 shares
feed.summary: Ollie's Bargain Outlet Holdings, Inc. Executive Chairman John W. Swygert sold 3,330 shares of common stock at a weighted average price of $95.80, totaling $319,014. This transaction was made pursuant to a pre-planned Rule 10b5-1 trading plan established on June 23, 2025. After the sale, Swygert directly holds 48,200 shares of Ollie's common stock.

feed.title: After Plunging 15.2% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why the Trend Might Reverse for InspireMD (NSPR)
feed.summary: InspireMD (NSPR) stock has fallen by 15.2% in the past four weeks but is now considered oversold based on its Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 29.32, suggesting a potential rebound. This technical indicator, combined with a 14.6% increase in consensus EPS estimates from sell-side analysts and a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), indicates that the stock might be poised for a turnaround. Investors may see an opportunity for entry given the exhaustion of selling pressure and positive fundamental shifts.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Maintains Omada Health(OMDA.US) With Buy Rating, Cuts Target Price to $23
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has reaffirmed its Buy rating for Omada Health (OMDA.US) but has adjusted its price target downwards to $23. This indicates a continued positive outlook on the company's prospects despite a revised valuation.

feed.title: OFA Group announces board changes with appointment of Erwin Baquiran Pineda
feed.summary: OFA Group (NASDAQ:OFAL) has announced an immediate change to its board of directors, with Won Ping Cheng resigning and Erwin Baquiran Pineda appointed as an independent director. Mr. Pineda, a real estate executive, will serve an initial two-year term and be compensated with cash and restricted ordinary shares. This change occurs while the company's shares are trading significantly lower, down 88% over the past year.

feed.title: [8-K] New ERA Energy & Digital, Inc. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: New ERA Energy & Digital, Inc. (NUAI) has filed an 8-K report detailing significant material events. The company entered into a Term Loan Agreement for up to $290 million with Macquarie Equipment Capital Inc., issued warrants and common stock to the lender, and discussed a federal securities class action lawsuit filed against it on April 1, 2026. The report also updated risk factors related to indebtedness, short selling, and power supply constraints for its data center projects.

feed.title: OneMain Holdings, Inc. INVESTOR ALERT: Kirby McInerney LLP Announces Investigation Into Potential Securities Fraud
feed.summary: Kirby McInerney LLP has initiated an investigation into potential securities fraud by OneMain Holdings, Inc. following a lawsuit filed by the New York Attorney General and a coalition of 12 other state attorneys general. The lawsuit alleges that OneMain misled customers and trapped borrowers in expensive loans with hidden costs, which led to a 5.4% drop in OneMain's share price. The law firm is encouraging investors who purchased OneMain securities to contact them regarding their rights as the investigation proceeds.

feed.title: New Era Energy & Digital Secures $290M Credit Facility
feed.summary: New Era Energy & Digital, a Nasdaq-listed company focused on digital infrastructure and renewable energy, has successfully closed a $290 million senior secured term loan credit facility. This financing will support the company's expansion of next-generation digital infrastructure, such as data centers, and renewable energy projects like wind and solar farms, primarily in Texas. The capital will be deployed over the next 12-18 months to fuel its ambitious growth plans and meet the increasing demand for sustainable infrastructure.

feed.title: New Era Energy & Digital stock surges 23% on $290M loan deal
feed.summary: New Era Energy & Digital Inc. saw its stock surge by 23% after securing a $290 million senior secured term loan credit facility from Macquarie Group. This financing will support the company's Texas Critical Data Center flagship project. In connection with the loan, Macquarie will also purchase $5 million in common stock and warrants.

feed.title: New Era Energy & Digital Launches Common Stock Offering
feed.summary: New Era Energy & Digital (NUAI) commenced an underwritten public offering of its common stock on April 8, 2026. The company intends to use the net proceeds primarily to repay outstanding borrowings under a senior secured convertible promissory note. The offering's completion, size, and terms are subject to market conditions.

feed.title: Wayne Bank parent to post Q1 results before market on April 27
feed.summary: Norwood Financial Corp (Nasdaq: NWFL), parent company of Wayne Bank, announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results before the market opens on Monday, April 27, 2026. A live webcast and conference call will follow at 10:30 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results. Investors are required to register to receive dial-in details and a unique PIN, with a slide presentation and replay available on the investor relations site after the event.

feed.title: New Era Energy & Digital (NUAI) launches underwritten common stock sale
feed.summary: New Era Energy & Digital (NUAI) has announced an underwritten public offering of its common stock, with proceeds primarily intended to repay a senior secured convertible promissory note to SharonAI, Inc. The company plans to grant underwriters a 30-day option to purchase an additional 15% of shares. The offering's terms, including size and pricing, are subject to market conditions, and Northland Capital Markets is serving as the lead book-running manager.

feed.title: [Form 4] Cloudflare, Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Cloudflare, Inc. CEO and Board Co-Chair Matthew Prince reported pre-planned stock transactions through family trusts, converting Class B to Class A Common Stock and subsequently selling 156,493 Class A shares for approximately $33.17 million. These transactions, executed between April 6–8, 2026, were done under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted in February 2025. Despite the sales, Prince-associated trusts maintain substantial Class B holdings convertible into Class A stock.

feed.title: NATR Financials: Revenue Breakdown, Margins & Competitor Comparison
feed.summary: Nature's Sunshine Products Inc (NATR) generates most of its revenue from the General Health segment, contributing 41.3% or $47.38M of total sales, followed by Digestive and Cardiovascular segments. The company demonstrates strong profitability with a gross margin of 72.52%, an operating margin of 4.30%, and a net margin of 3.65%, alongside a 12.32% Return on Equity. NATR, with a market capitalization of $462.55M, outperforms competitors like NAGE in gross margin but trails USNA.

feed.title: Murphy Oil, SM Energy, Northern Oil and Gas, Crescent Energy, and Patterson-UTI Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Energy stocks including Murphy Oil, SM Energy, Northern Oil and Gas, Crescent Energy, and Patterson-UTI experienced significant drops following President Donald Trump's announcement of a two-week suspension of attacks on Iran. This news led to a massive collapse in crude oil prices as the "war premium" was removed and the outlook for global oil supply shifted to a potential surplus. Investors are rotating out of defensive "inflation hedges" back into growth-oriented sectors, viewing the ceasefire as a sign that the peak of the energy-driven profit cycle may have passed.

feed.title: NGVT Financials: Revenue Breakdown, Margins & Competitor Comparison
feed.summary: The article provides a financial overview of Ingevity Corp (NGVT), detailing its revenue breakdown, profitability margins, and a comparison with competitors. NGVT generates significant revenue from its Pavement Technologies and Industrial Specialties product lines, with a gross margin of 34.42%. Despite its leading market capitalization of $2.49B, the company reports negative net margins and Return on Equity, highlighting areas for investor consideration.

feed.title: Insurance moves: Arch Insurance, AXA, UIB and Asta
feed.summary: This article details recent senior appointments and promotions across several European insurance companies, including Arch Insurance, AXA Insurance UK, UIB, and Asta. Key moves include new cyber leadership at Arch, a claims transformation role at AXA, a marine leadership transition at UIB, and multiple promotions within Asta to strengthen its leadership team. These changes reflect a focus on growth areas and operational capabilities within the evolving insurance market.

feed.title: APA Corp. (APA) Tumbles 9.8% on Double-Digit Oil Plunge
feed.summary: APA Corp. (NASDAQ:APA) saw its stock price drop by 9.8% due to a significant plunge in crude oil prices. This decline follows an agreement between the US and Iran for a two-week ceasefire, which includes the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, a critical oil passage. The company, like its peers, had previously benefited from surging oil prices after the strait's initial closure but now faces downward pressure.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise Line Faces Dual Challenges
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line (NCLH) faces significant challenges, including a 30% stock drop due to Middle East conflict-induced oil price volatility and weak 2026 guidance expecting flat net yield. The company is also struggling with slow progress on amenities for its private island. Despite these issues, NCLH anticipates an increase in earnings per share from $2.11 in 2025 to $2.38 in 2026, offering a glimmer of hope amidst persistent market uncertainty.

feed.title: Northpointe Bancshares declares $0.025 quarterly dividend By Investing.com
feed.summary: Northpointe Bancshares, Inc. announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.025 per common share, payable on May 4, 2026, to stockholders of record as of April 15, 2026. This brings the annual dividend to $0.10 per share, representing a 0.56% dividend yield. The company reported strong Q4 2025 performance and recently appointed Rodney E. Hood to its Board of Directors.

feed.title: NEXN PE Ratio & Valuation, Is NEXN Overvalued
feed.summary: This article analyzes Nexxen International Ltd (NEXN) valuation metrics, determining it is in the "Fair zone" with a forward PE ratio of 6.41. The fair price is estimated between 6.55 to 13.83. Key metrics like Price-to-Book, FCF Yield, and P/S ratio are compared against historical averages and competitor benchmarks, noting that its P/S premium might be unsustainable given its revenue growth.

feed.title: [Form 4] nCino, Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: nCino, Inc. CEO & President Sean Desmond engaged in a routine, pre-planned transaction by exercising stock options and selling shares. He exercised options for 8,065 shares at $4.98 each and subsequently sold 15,440 common shares at $17.06 per share. All transactions were executed under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on January 6, 2026, and after these sales, Desmond still directly holds a significant number of shares, indicating continued exposure to the company.

feed.title: -6.83% for NuCana stock as tight trading range restricts moves
feed.summary: NuCana stock (NCNA) dropped 6.83% to $1.91, exhibiting short-term strength above its 20-day SMA but remaining below its 50-day and 200-day SMAs, indicating persistent medium and long-term technical pressure. Mixed momentum indicators and strong selling biases suggest that while buyers are active, a sustained uptrend is unlikely. Analysts expect NCNA to trade sideways between $1.85 and $2.10 in the near term, with a higher probability of downside movement.

feed.title: How Marzetti’s New High‑Protein Ranch Line Could Shape Marzetti (MZTI) Investors’ View
feed.summary: Marzetti's (MZTI) recent launch of a high-protein ranch line signifies its strategic push into health-conscious food products, aiming to broaden appeal and enhance its investment narrative. While this innovation aligns with Marzetti's focus on premiumization and potential margin expansion, investors should consider the ongoing risk posed by private label brands and retailer consolidation on pricing power. The article suggests this move could support volume and a richer product mix, though its ultimate impact on offsetting pricing pressures remains to be seen.

feed.title: Murphy Oil Corp stock: Why the 9% plunge today changes everything for investors
feed.summary: Shares of Murphy Oil Corp (NYSE:MUR) plunged over 9% to $38.86 today due to a sector-wide selloff triggered by falling oil prices after President Trump announced a suspension of attacks on Iran, removing the "war premium." This sudden drop, which wiped out year-to-date gains, highlights the stock's volatility and the energy sector's sensitivity to geopolitical events and commodity prices. Investors are now left to determine if this represents a buying opportunity or the beginning of a deeper repricing, with mixed signals from analysts and ongoing risks related to oil futures and geopolitical stability.

feed.title: Holder Susan Ocampo lists multiple Common stock sales in MTSI Form 144 (MTSI)
feed.summary: A Form 144 filing from MACOM Technology Solutions Holdings, Inc. (MTSI) discloses proposed sales of Common stock by an affiliate holder, Susan Ocampo. The filing lists a 200,000-share Founder Shares line and numerous individual sale entries by Ocampo between February 3, 2026, and March 25, 2026, including several large transactions. This indicates planned resale activity by an insider rather than a direct company issuance.

feed.title: MultiSensor AI adjusts fractional share handling in reverse split By Investing.com
feed.summary: MultiSensor AI Holdings, Inc. announced modifications to its upcoming 1-for-40 reverse stock split, stating that fractional shares will be rounded up at the record holder level with the transfer agent, rather than at the beneficial level, to prevent arbitrage. The changes will take effect on April 13, 2026, when the stock will begin trading on a split-adjusted basis on The Nasdaq Capital Market under the existing symbol "MSAI." The company provides condition monitoring and threat detection services and is currently trading at $0.17, with InvestingPro suggesting it is undervalued despite its volatility.

feed.title: Director at Modular Medical (MODD) awarded fully vested options for 250 shares
feed.summary: Modular Medical, Inc. director Philip Brent Sheibley was granted 250 fully vested stock options with an exercise price of $4.55 per share, under the company's Outside Director Compensation Plan. The options are exercisable immediately and expire on March 31, 2036. This transaction was reported in a Form 4 SEC filing by StockTitan.

feed.title: Director at Modular Medical (NASDAQ: MODD) granted 250 stock options at $4.55
feed.summary: Modular Medical (NASDAQ: MODD) director Jeff D. Goldberg was granted 250 stock options on March 31, 2026. The options have an exercise price of $4.55 per share, were fully vested on the grant date, and expire on March 31, 2036. This grant was part of the company’s Outside Director Compensation Plan.

feed.title: Diageo supplier to idle 2 Kentucky whiskey distilleries
feed.summary: MGP Ingredients, a supplier to Diageo, will idle two Kentucky whiskey distilleries starting May 1 due to an oversupplied market caused by declining alcohol consumption and global tariffs. This pause in production, expected to last at least a year, will result in 33 layoffs. Other spirits giants like Suntory, Diageo, and Brown-Forman have also announced cutbacks as the American whiskey market faces excess capacity and elevated inventory.

feed.title: Collierville company's top execs earned over $38M combined
feed.summary: The top executives at Collierville-based Mueller Industries collectively earned over $38 million. The company's CEO alone made $27.6 million, significantly more than the median worker's salary of $45,602. This news follows Mueller Industries reporting its highest annual operating and net income in its history.

feed.title: Is Maximus' Higher Dividend And EPS Outlook Altering The Investment Case For Maximus (MMS)?
feed.summary: Maximus (MMS) recently announced a higher quarterly dividend of US$0.33 per share and increased its full-year adjusted EPS outlook, accompanied by share repurchases. This move signals management's confidence in cash generation, despite a narrowing revenue forecast. While analysts hold differing views on future revenue and earnings, the company's investment narrative continues to hinge on government reliance on third-party program administration and its ability to manage risks like automation.

feed.title: Brown Shelly, Miami International Holdings EVP, sells $135k in MIAX stock
feed.summary: Shelly Brown, EVP and Chief Strategy Officer at Miami International Holdings (MIAX), sold 3,257 shares of common stock for approximately $135,214 on April 6th and 7th, 2026. These sales, executed under a pre-arranged trading plan, occurred as MIAX stock traded above InvestingPro's Fair Value estimate. The company recently reported strong Q4 2025 financial results, with EPS surpassing expectations and a significant increase in revenue and trading volume.

feed.title: [ARS] MILLER INDUSTRIES INC /TN/ SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS SEC filing by MILLER INDUSTRIES INC /TN/ (MLR) on April 8, 2026, at 4:10 PM UTC. The filing is available as a PDF document on SEC EDGAR. It also provides an overview of MLR's stock data, rankings, and recent news and filings.

feed.title: Miller Industries Updates Executive Severance Plan After Review
feed.summary: Miller Industries recently updated its executive severance plan, replacing the previous change in control arrangement. The key modification involves removing equity-based bonus amounts from severance calculations, which will reduce potential payouts while maintaining other protections for executives. This move is seen as a way to refine compensation risk and cost management without significantly altering the company's executive retention framework.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Autodesk, Inc. (ADSK) March 2026
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley reaffirmed its Overweight rating on Autodesk, Inc. (ADSK) on March 18, 2026, citing strong February billings data as a key factor. This maintained rating signals the firm's continued positive outlook for ADSK relative to its peers. Despite the positive outlook, the stock experienced a short-term price decline of -4.05% (-$10.17) around the announcement, highlighting market volatility.

feed.title: The Walt Disney Company to cut up to 1,000 jobs as marketing overhaul begins
feed.summary: The Walt Disney Company is set to cut up to 1,000 jobs, primarily within its marketing division, as part of a restructuring effort dubbed "Project Imagine." Led by new Chief Marketing Officer Asad Ayaz, this initiative aims to consolidate marketing operations and reduce costs. The layoffs will affect less than 1% of Disney's 231,000-strong workforce and were reportedly planned before Josh D'Amaro became CEO in March.

feed.title: Africa’s biggest refinery taps Honeywell to train 3,000 workers
feed.summary: Honeywell will provide digital process and automation technologies, Performance+ Services, and operator training to the Dangote Petroleum Refinery in Nigeria. This collaboration aims to boost the refinery's operational efficiency, equipment reliability, and throughput, supporting a planned capacity increase from 650,000 to 1.4 million barrels per day within three years. Additionally, Honeywell will offer advanced training and simulation solutions, including digital-twin Operator Training Simulators, to upskill over 3,000 local workers and enhance asset value.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Biogen (BIIB) After Its 49% One Year Share Price Surge
feed.summary: Biogen (BIIB) has seen a 49.3% share price surge over the last year, prompting reassessment of its valuation. Simply Wall St's analysis, including a Discounted Cash Flow model, suggests the stock is currently undervalued by 50.6%, trading at US$179.90 compared to an estimated intrinsic value of $363.97 per share. However, its P/E ratio of 20.42x is slightly above the Biotech industry average, making it appear overvalued on that metric, with diverse investor narratives suggesting fair values ranging from $150 to $255.

feed.title: Assessing Pfizer (PFE) Valuation After Bearish Analyst Rating And COVID Vaccine Trial Pause
feed.summary: Recent bearish analyst coverage and a paused COVID-19 vaccine trial have impacted sentiment around Pfizer (PFE), despite the stock showing positive year-to-date and annual returns. While the most popular narrative suggests Pfizer is 10.3% undervalued with a fair value of $30.62, this depends on successful oncology execution and new product launches, alongside risks like high debt and potential dividend cuts. Investors are encouraged to consider these mixed signals and explore other investment opportunities.

feed.title: NextDecade (NXT) Slashes 7.5% on Energy Decline
feed.summary: NextDecade (NXT) stock fell by 7.55% following an announcement of a two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran, which dampened investor sentiment for energy companies. This geopolitical development led to a decline in natural gas prices and impacted companies like NextDecade, which had previously benefited from market tensions. The company recently reported a widened net loss for 2024, and the article suggests that AI stocks might offer better investment opportunities.

feed.title: MAIN SEC Filings - Main Str Cap Corp 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides a comprehensive overview of Main Street Capital Corporation's SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K forms, alongside insider trading reports. It highlights how these documents provide insights into the company's financial results, capital structure, and significant corporate events. The platform also offers AI-powered tools to summarize filings and extract key information for investors.

feed.title: Mister Car Wash Inc stock: What you should know before buying now
feed.summary: Mister Car Wash Inc. operates a large chain of automated car washes in the US, known for its subscription model that drives steady revenue. The company is positioned for growth in the fragmented car wash industry and is considered a resilient investment against economic fluctuations, appealing to investors looking for diversification and long-term stability. Analysts generally view the stock as a hold or accumulate, noting its strong market position and growth potential through acquisitions and membership retention.

feed.title: MacroGenics resumes enrollment in lorigerlimab cancer study By Investing.com
feed.summary: MacroGenics Inc. announced that the U.S. FDA has lifted a partial clinical hold on its Phase 2 LINNET study for lorigerlimab in gynecologic cancers, allowing for the enrollment of new participants under a revised protocol. This decision has been met with investor optimism, reflected in the stock's recent surge. The company anticipates providing a mid-year clinical update on the program.

feed.title: Former M&T exec joins rival bank
feed.summary: NBT Bank has appointed David Ensminger, formerly of M&T, as its director of business banking sales. Based in Albany, Ensminger will lead a team of small-business bankers across the bank's operational footprint. This move signifies NBT Bank's effort to enhance its business banking leadership.

feed.title: Luxfer declares 13 cent quarterly dividend By Investing.com
feed.summary: Luxfer Holdings PLC (NYSE: LXFR) has declared a quarterly dividend of 13 cents per ordinary share, offering an attractive 4.3% annual yield. The dividend is payable on May 6, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 17, 2026. This announcement follows a recent Q4 2025 earnings report where the company beat EPS expectations but missed revenue forecasts.

feed.title: LAKE: DA Davidson Lowers Target Price to $10, Maintains Neutral Rating | LAKE Stock News
feed.summary: DA Davidson analyst Michael Shlisky has lowered the target price for Lakeland Industries (LAKE) from $14.00 to $10.00 but maintained a Neutral rating. This adjustment reflects a 28.57% decrease in the target price. Despite the reduction, the average target price from four analysts is $15.75, suggesting a 71.94% upside from the current price, with a consensus "Outperform" rating.

feed.title: Comstock Inc. (LODE) director granted 7,993 shares as quarterly board compensation
feed.summary: Comstock Inc. director Leo M. Drozdoff was granted 7,993 shares of Common Stock as quarterly board compensation for his services from April 1 to June 30, 2026. This award, valued at $0.00 per share, was issued under the company's 2020 and 2022 Equity Incentive Plans. Following the transaction, Drozdoff directly holds 186,474 shares of Comstock Inc. Common Stock.

feed.title: Mach Natural Resources sells 9.0M common units in underwritten offering
feed.summary: Mach Natural Resources announced that Selling Unitholders sold 9,000,000 common units in an underwritten offering that closed on April 8, 2026. The company will not receive any proceeds from this sale, though Tom L. Ward and affiliated entities purchased 153,256 common units. The underwriter also has a 30-day option to buy up to 1,350,000 additional units from the Selling Unitholders.

feed.title: FDA Lifts Partial Clinical Hold on MacroGenics' LINNET Study; Enrollment to Resume
feed.summary: The FDA has removed the partial clinical hold on MacroGenics' Phase 2 LINNET study of lorigerlimab, allowing patient enrollment to continue. This decision follows a revised protocol incorporating additional risk-mitigation measures for potential hematologic and cardiac toxicities. MacroGenics expects to provide a clinical update on the program in mid-2026.
